Project: Arduino Day Philippines 2025 Website
Category: UI/UX
Summary: UI design for Arduino Day Philippines 2025 Website.
Tech stack: Figma
Status: live
Live link: https://embed.figma.com/proto/FwkNSVMQJAMT0AnwS8VRSp/Arduino-Day-2025-Website?page-id=1%3A9&node-id=5-3&p=f&viewport=516%2C19%2C0.07&scaling=min-zoom&content-scaling=fixed&starting-point-node-id=5%3A3&embed-host=share

Project: Aura: AI-Powered Financial Intelligence Web App
Category: AI · FinTech
Summary: A web app that helps users log expenses in natural language, review extracted transactions, understand spending patterns, and get AI-assisted financial guidance.
Tech stack: Java, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, Redis, Gemini API
Status: live
Live link: https://aura-finance.me

Project: Balai ni Juan
Category: Web
Summary: A client project event venue booking website that allows users to explore venue features, view photos, and book an appointment directly.
Tech stack: JavaScript, HTML, CSS
Status: live
Live link: https://balai-ni-juan.vercel.app

Project: CrowdFlow: Itinerary Planner
Category: AI
Summary: A dynamic, crowd-aware itinerary planner demo that builds a day plan, estimates how crowded each spot is, and automatically reroutes to a similar but emptier place when somewhere gets packed.
Tech stack: Next.js, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, React, Leaflet, Gemini API, OpenWeather
Status: live
Live link: https://crowdflowph.vercel.app

Project: FairySplit
Category: Web App
Summary: A shared-expense app for dorms, apartments, or houses where bills should be split based on how long each person actually stayed inside the shared space, not just divided equally.
Tech stack: React, Vite, NestJS, PostgreSQL
Status: wip

Project: Solar Connect
Category: Web App · IoT
Summary: A Progressive Web App that provides real-time updates for a solar-powered charging station thesis project.
Tech stack: Next.js, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Supabase, OpenWeather
Status: live
Live link: https://www.solarconnect.live

Project: Sparkfest
Category: UI/UX
Summary: UI design for Sparkfest 2025 - GDG PUP Hackathon website
Tech stack: Figma
Status: live
Live link: https://sparkfest-2025.vercel.app

# Phoebe Rhone Gangoso — Résumé

## Summary

Phoebe Rhone Gangoso (nickname "Peewee") is a graduating BS Computer Engineering
student at the Polytechnic University of the Philippines (PUP) – Manila, pursuing
Software and AI Engineering roles. She has a foundation in full-stack software
engineering with an active focus on Generative AI (GenAI), RAG pipelines, and
workflow automation. Her guiding goal is to build production AI systems — her own
portfolio's "Sorting Hat" assistant is itself a demonstration of that skill.

## Skills

**Languages:** Bash, HTML, Java, JavaScript, Python, SQL, TypeScript.

**AI & Automation:** GenAI, RAG pipelines, vector databases, document ingestion,
prompt engineering, Gemini API, LangChain, MCP (Model Context Protocol),
Chatbot Builder AI, Claude Code, Codex, REST APIs.

**Frameworks & Libraries:** Next.js, Node.js, React, Spring Boot, Tailwind CSS.

**Databases & Cloud:** PostgreSQL, Redis, Firebase, Supabase, H2, Render, Vercel.

**Tools:** Docker, Figma, Git, GitHub, GitHub Actions, Maven.

**Methodologies:** Agile, Scrum, CI/CD, wireframing.

## Work Experience

### SOFI AI Tech Solution Inc. — Junior AI Engineer (Contract)
*January 2026 – March 2026*

- Optimized and managed stability for 10+ live client chatbots by rapidly diagnosing
  production-level defects and maintaining AI workflows.
- Developed a document ingestion system using Python and FAISS to perform
  vector-based similarity searches.
- Refined RAG pipelines for document-based knowledge training to provide accurate
  automated responses.

### SOFI AI Tech Solution Inc. — Developer Intern
*July 2025 – December 2025*

- Automated and successfully launched a client-facing AI conversational agent into
  live production using visual workflow builders and advanced prompt engineering.
- Built integrations with Google Sheets using Google Apps Script for automated,
  efficient data collection.
- Leveraged REST APIs to enhance chatbot functionalities and streamline processes.

### Dewise Solutions Philippines Inc. — Software Engineer Intern
*August 2024 – October 2024*

- Completed 10+ Microsoft Learning paths focused on DevOps, Python, Azure services,
  Cloud, AI, GitHub, and Copilot.
- Developed the frontend of a Progressive Web App using Next.js and TypeScript.
- Designed UI/UX flows through wireframing, high-fidelity prototyping, user research,
  and design thinking.

## Leadership Experience

### Google Developer Groups on Campus PUP — UI/UX Lead
*September 2024 – September 2025*

- Led a team of 180+ members with a 12-member support committee to execute 5
  workshops and study jams, including a 200+ participant inaugural session.
- Delivered sessions on design fundamentals and Figma while overseeing end-to-end
  event planning and coordination.

### PUP Manila Microsoft Student Community — Associate Director, DevOps Division
*September 2024 – September 2025*

event planning and coordination.

### PUP Manila Microsoft Student Community — Associate Director, DevOps Division
*September 2024 – September 2025*

- Conducted study sessions on DevOps and key concepts such as CI/CD pipelines,
  deployment strategies, and various DevOps tools and services within Microsoft Azure.

### Arduino Day Philippines 2025 — Website Team UI/UX Lead
*January 2025 – March 2025*

- Led a team of UI/UX design volunteers in creating the UI design for the Arduino Day
  Philippines 2025 website.

### PUP The Programmers' Guild — Devskolar & Media Committee
*April 2023 – January 2025*

- Volunteered and created design materials for marketing, social media postings, and
  events.

## Education

**Polytechnic University of the Philippines – Manila**
Bachelor of Science in Computer Engineering (graduating). Coursework and projects
span full-stack development, AI/GenAI, and UI/UX design.
